positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully authenticated and redirected to the dashboard/home page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page is displayed with username and password fields
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the home/dashboard page
Verify the authenticated user's name or email is displayed in the UI
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login with valid username and password

positive_scenarios.expected_result: Login page renders correctly with all required UI elements visible and functional
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Verify the login page title or heading is displayed
Verify the username/email input field is visible and enabled
Verify the password input field is visible and enabled
Verify the 'Login' or 'Submit' button is visible and clickable
Verify the password field masks the entered characters
positive_scenarios.title: Login page loads correctly with all UI elements visible

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User session is maintained after page refresh and the user remains authenticated
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Refresh the browser page (F5 or browser refresh button)
Verify the user remains logged in and is not redirected back to the login page
positive_scenarios.title: Successful login and session persists on page refresh

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User is successfully logged out, session is terminated, and the user is redirected to the login page
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter the valid password in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is redirected to the dashboard/home page
Locate and click the 'Logout' or 'Sign Out' button/link
Verify the user is redirected back to the login page
Verify that navigating back (browser back button) does not restore the authenticated session
positive_scenarios.title: Successful logout after login

positive_scenarios.expected_result: User can successfully log in using copy-paste input method and is redirected to the dashboard
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Copy the email address 'testd1051@gmail.com' from clipboard
Paste the copied email into the username/email field
Copy the valid password from clipboard
Paste the copied password into the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is successfully redirected to the dashboard/home page
positive_scenarios.title: Login with valid credentials using copy-paste into fields

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and validation error messages are displayed for both empty fields
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Leave the username/email field empty
Leave the password field empty
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify that no navigation to the dashboard occurs
Verify that appropriate validation error messages are displayed (e.g., 'Username is required', 'Password is required')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty username and empty password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is displayed without revealing which field is incorrect
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Enter an incorrect password 'WrongPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'Incorrect username or password' is displayed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with valid username and incorrect password

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is rejected and an appropriate error message is displayed for unrecognized credentials
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a non-existent email 'nonexistent_user_xyz@fakeemail.com' in the username/email field
Enter any password 'AnyPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify an error message such as 'Invalid credentials' or 'User not found' is displayed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid/non-existent email address

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and a validation error message indicating the password field is required is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter 'testd1051@gmail.com' in the username/email field
Leave the password field completely empty
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify a validation error message such as 'Password is required' is displayed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with empty password field only

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Login is prevented and an email format validation error message is displayed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter an invalid email format 'invalidemail@@domain..com' in the username/email field
Enter any password 'AnyPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify a format validation error message such as 'Enter a valid email address' is displayed
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with invalid email format

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Application handles SQL injection safely, login is rejected, and no sensitive system information is exposed
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter SQL injection payload '" OR '1'='1' --' in the username/email field
Enter any password 'AnyPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the user is NOT redirected to the dashboard
Verify the application returns an error message or validation failure without exposing system details
Verify no unauthorized access is granted
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with SQL injection in username field

negative_scenarios.expected_result: Application gracefully handles excessively long input, rejects the login attempt, and displays an appropriate error message without crashing
steps: Navigate to https://development.d36z6oo50ky8dh.amplifyapp.com/login
Enter a string of 500 characters (e.g., 'a' repeated 500 times followed by '@test.com') in the username/email field
Enter any password 'AnyPassword123!' in the password field
Click the 'Login' or 'Submit' button
Verify the application does not crash or throw an unhandled exception
Verify an appropriate error message is displayed (e.g., 'Invalid credentials' or 'Input too long')
negative_scenarios.title: Login attempt with excessively long username input (boundary value)
